awx_credential.overview: Manages AWX credentials used by job templates, inventory sources, and integrations.

fieldDescriptions.credential_type_id: Numeric ID of the credential type definition (for example Machine, Source Control, or Vault).
fieldDescriptions.inputs: Object containing credential input fields required by the selected credential type.
fieldDescriptions.name: Credential name shown in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.organization_id: Numeric ID of the organization that owns this credential.
fieldDescriptions.team_id: Numeric ID of a team granted owner access when the credential is created.
fieldDescriptions.user_id: Numeric ID of a user granted owner access when the credential is created.

onlineResearchChecklist.objectBehavior: Verified credential creation behavior and input payload expectations in AWX credential docs.
onlineResearchChecklist.relatedInteractions: Verified credential interactions with organizations, teams, users, and dependent launch objects.
onlineResearchChecklist.parameterSemantics: Verified reference-field semantics for credential_type_id, organization_id, team_id, and user_id.

primaryExample.title: Machine credential

extraExamples.title: Source control token credential

awx_inventory.overview: Manages AWX inventories used as host collections for job execution.

fieldDescriptions.host_filter: Host filter expression used by smart inventories.
fieldDescriptions.kind: Inventory behavior mode (empty string for normal, `smart`, or `constructed`).
fieldDescriptions.name: Inventory name shown in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.organization_id: Numeric ID of the organization that owns the inventory.
fieldDescriptions.prevent_instance_group_fallback: Prevents AWX from automatically applying organization/global instance group fallback behavior.

onlineResearchChecklist.objectBehavior: Verified inventory object behavior and mode semantics in AWX inventory docs.
onlineResearchChecklist.relatedInteractions: Verified inventory interactions with organizations, hosts, groups, and inventory sources.
onlineResearchChecklist.parameterSemantics: Verified reference-field semantics for organization_id and related inventory linkage behavior.

primaryExample.title: Standard inventory

extraExamples.title: Smart inventory

awx_inventory_source.overview: Manages dynamic inventory sources that synchronize host data into AWX inventories.
awx_inventory_source.conceptPrimer: Inventory sources connect AWX inventories to external systems such as cloud APIs or SCM files. AWX can refresh these sources on launch and control overwrite behavior for imported groups, hosts, and variables.

fieldDescriptions.credential_id: Numeric ID of the credential used to authenticate to the source system.
fieldDescriptions.description: Optional explanation of the source purpose.
fieldDescriptions.inventory_id: Numeric ID of the destination inventory populated by this source.
fieldDescriptions.name: Inventory source name shown in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.overwrite: When true, AWX replaces local groups/hosts using the synced source data.
fieldDescriptions.overwrite_vars: When true, AWX replaces local variable values during sync.
fieldDescriptions.source: Dynamic inventory backend plugin (for example `ec2`, `gce`, `scm`, or `constructed`).
fieldDescriptions.source_path: Relative path in the source project that points to the inventory file.
fieldDescriptions.source_project_id: Numeric ID of the AWX project used when `source = "scm"`.
fieldDescriptions.source_vars: JSON-encoded object or YAML string of source-specific plugin variables.
fieldDescriptions.timeout: Maximum sync runtime in seconds before AWX cancels the update.
fieldDescriptions.update_cache_timeout: Seconds AWX waits before allowing another automatic source refresh.
fieldDescriptions.update_on_launch: When true, AWX refreshes this source before dependent launches.

onlineResearchChecklist.objectBehavior: Verified inventory source sync behavior and source plugin semantics in AWX inventory docs.
onlineResearchChecklist.relatedInteractions: Verified inventory source interactions with inventories, credentials, and source projects.
onlineResearchChecklist.parameterSemantics: Verified reference-field semantics for inventory_id, credential_id, and source_project_id.

primaryExample.title: EC2 dynamic inventory source
primaryExample.description: This example assumes an existing AWS credential named `aws-inventory`.

extraExamples.title: SCM-backed inventory source

awx_job_template.overview: Manages AWX job templates that launch project playbooks against inventories with optional runtime prompts.
awx_job_template.conceptPrimer: Job templates are reusable launch definitions in AWX. They combine a project, playbook, inventory defaults, and prompt flags so operators can run consistent automation with controlled runtime overrides.

fieldDescriptions.ask_inventory_on_launch: When true, AWX prompts for inventory selection during launch.
fieldDescriptions.ask_limit_on_launch: When true, AWX prompts for an Ansible limit pattern at launch.
fieldDescriptions.ask_skip_tags_on_launch: When true, AWX prompts for skip tags at launch.
fieldDescriptions.ask_tags_on_launch: When true, AWX prompts for job tags at launch.
fieldDescriptions.ask_timeout_on_launch: When true, AWX prompts for a job timeout at launch.
fieldDescriptions.ask_variables_on_launch: When true, AWX allows operators to provide extra vars at launch time.
fieldDescriptions.description: Optional explanation displayed to operators in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.execution_environment_id: Numeric ID of the execution environment container image used to run jobs.
fieldDescriptions.extra_vars: Object of default extra variables passed to launched jobs.
fieldDescriptions.inventory_id: Numeric ID of the default inventory used when the launch does not prompt for inventory.
fieldDescriptions.job_type: Execution mode for the template, usually `run` for normal automation or `check` for dry-run behavior.
fieldDescriptions.name: Human-readable name shown in the AWX UI and API listings.
fieldDescriptions.playbook: Playbook path inside the project repository, for example `site.yml`.
fieldDescriptions.project_id: Numeric ID of the AWX project that provides the playbook content.
fieldDescriptions.survey_enabled: Enables survey-based prompts for this template.
fieldDescriptions.use_fact_cache: Enables AWX fact caching for jobs launched from this template.
fieldDescriptions.verbosity: Ansible verbosity level used when running this template.
fieldDescriptions.webhook_credential_id: Numeric ID of the credential used to validate webhook callbacks.
fieldDescriptions.webhook_service: Webhook provider AWX accepts for launch requests.

onlineResearchChecklist.objectBehavior: Verified job template launch behavior, prompt flags, and defaults in AWX job template docs.
onlineResearchChecklist.relatedInteractions: Verified how job templates bind projects, inventories, execution environments, and webhook credentials.
onlineResearchChecklist.parameterSemantics: Verified reference-field semantics for project_id, inventory_id, execution_environment_id, and webhook_credential_id.

primaryExample.title: Standard project-backed job template

extraExamples.title: Prompted launch with defaults
Webhook-enabled job template
extraExamples.description: This example assumes an existing webhook signing credential named `github-webhook`.

awx_project.overview: Manages AWX projects that supply automation content from source control or archive locations.

fieldDescriptions.allow_override: Allows job templates to override this project branch at launch.
fieldDescriptions.credential_id: Numeric ID of the source-control credential used to access private repositories.
fieldDescriptions.default_environment_id: Numeric ID of the default execution environment for project jobs.
fieldDescriptions.description: Optional explanation displayed to project users.
fieldDescriptions.name: Human-readable project name in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.organization_id: Numeric ID of the owning organization.
fieldDescriptions.scm_branch: Branch, tag, or revision checked out by AWX.
fieldDescriptions.scm_type: Source control backend used by AWX (`git`, `svn`, `archive`, or manual).
fieldDescriptions.scm_update_cache_timeout: Seconds AWX waits before allowing another automatic project update.
fieldDescriptions.scm_update_on_launch: When true, AWX updates project content before dependent jobs launch.
fieldDescriptions.scm_url: Repository URL or remote archive URL for project content.
fieldDescriptions.timeout: Maximum project update runtime in seconds before AWX cancels the update.

onlineResearchChecklist.objectBehavior: Verified project SCM sync behavior and update controls in AWX project documentation.
onlineResearchChecklist.relatedInteractions: Verified project interactions with organizations, credentials, and downstream job templates.
onlineResearchChecklist.parameterSemantics: Verified reference-field semantics for organization_id, credential_id, and default_environment_id.

primaryExample.title: Git-based project

extraExamples.title: Project with private repository credential
extraExamples.description: This example assumes an existing source-control credential named `git-deploy-key`.

fieldDescriptions.email: Email address used for notifications and API identity context in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.first_name: Given name shown in the AWX UI for this user account.
fieldDescriptions.last_name: Family name shown in the AWX UI for this user account.

awx_workflow_job_template.overview: Manages AWX workflow job templates that coordinate multi-step automation across linked nodes.
awx_workflow_job_template.conceptPrimer: Workflow job templates orchestrate multiple job templates with conditional paths. They are useful when releases or operations require ordered stages, approvals, and failure handling in one AWX launch artifact.

fieldDescriptions.ask_inventory_on_launch: When true, launch requests can override inventory.
fieldDescriptions.ask_limit_on_launch: When true, launch requests can set a limit pattern.
fieldDescriptions.ask_variables_on_launch: When true, launch requests can provide extra vars.
fieldDescriptions.description: Optional summary shown in AWX for operators.
fieldDescriptions.extra_vars: Object of default extra vars used by the workflow launch.
fieldDescriptions.inventory_id: Numeric ID of the inventory prompt default for workflow launches.
fieldDescriptions.name: Human-readable workflow template name in AWX.
fieldDescriptions.organization_id: Numeric ID of the owning organization.
fieldDescriptions.survey_enabled: Enables survey prompts for workflow launches.
fieldDescriptions.webhook_credential_id: Numeric ID of the credential used for webhook signature validation.
fieldDescriptions.webhook_service: Webhook provider accepted for workflow launches.

onlineResearchChecklist.objectBehavior: Verified workflow template launch behavior, prompts, and survey controls in AWX workflow docs.
onlineResearchChecklist.relatedInteractions: Verified workflow template interactions with organizations and webhook credentials.
onlineResearchChecklist.parameterSemantics: Verified reference-field semantics for organization_id, inventory_id, and webhook_credential_id.

primaryExample.title: Workflow template for release orchestration

extraExamples.title: Webhook-triggered workflow
extraExamples.description: This example assumes an existing webhook credential named `gitlab-webhook`.
